title: qraftyfied: Industrial Structures
description: Adding industrial/steampunk themed structures to your minecraft world with fun redstone techniques! 🏭 Perfect addon for qraftyfied.
body:
# Ever wanted more industrial structures? 🏭
**"qraftyfied INDUSTRIAL Structures" adds a variety of industrial/steampunk-themed structures to your Minecraft world.**

The goal is to have fun little structures with small redstone contraptions or mini trials. 
You want more vanilla-style structures? **I present you my main pack [qraftyfied](https://modrinth.com/datapack/qraftyfied)!**
![DISCORD INVITE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e84cad40de170a00e4be0283179e461b1d9a446.png)
## [DISCORD INVITE](https://www.qrafty.net/discord)

<details>
<summary>CURRENTLY ADDED STRUCTURES 🫐</summary>
- cabin (forest)
- construction (plains)
- digger (beach)
- elevator (meadow)
- grabber (snowy_plains)
- redstone_crack (sunflower_plains)
- oilrig (ocean)
- copper well (desert)
- snowy_crafter (snowy slopes)
- shooting range (sunflower plains)
- golem cycle (plains)
- automatic light (sunflower plains)

</details>


![title image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed0b677bb9d0ac31ed95e4edfb803e561142553f_0.webp)
